title: Create: Ender Transmission
body:
For MinecraftForge/Fabric/Quilt 1.18.2/1.19.2 & MinecraftForge/NeoForge 1.20.1



 

**About:**

Create: Ender Transmission implements stuff that makes distance/dimension doesn't matter for your machines.

 

**Content:**

- Chunk loader: Loads chunk using kinetic energy

- Energy Transmitter: Transfer energy

- Item Transmitter: Transfer items

- Fluid Transmitter: Transfer fluids



**Discord Community:**
https://discord.gg/fGUhb7Mwv2
